Rep. Andy Ogles (@RepOgles)

Is @elonmusk so clueless that he acts like Jim Crow never happened? Slavery and Jim Crow lasted 351 years of America’s 407 years (1619-2026).


Elon Musk (@elonmusk)

Exactly

posts.text:
Wrong @ClayTravis. You and @hughhewitt believe that America is never wrong. The history of our foreign policy proves that is not true. We have been a force of good, AND have been the force of evil. American media must tell the truth. Not advance lies dressed up as patriotism.


Clay Travis (@ClayTravis)

Wrong @stephenasmith. Every House Dem voted for a national ID in the Freedom To Vote Act. npr.org/2021/10/20/104023898…


The Vigilant Fox 🦊 (@VigilantFox)

Stephen A. Smith asks why the government can’t just provide a free ID to every American.

“How come we can’t just do that?!”

“We make sure true legalized American citizens are the ones with ID, and you eliminate those who are here illegally.”

“You know why we can’t do that?”
